name: Venison Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the Onion Soup Mix and 1 cup of water.
2. Shape into a loaf and place in a lightly greased pan.
3. Bake for 1 hour at 350 degrees.
4. Baste every 10 minutes with a mixture of 1 cup water and 1/2 package dried onion soup mix.
